title: Newcastle Coders July: From Portal Panic to Pipeline Power: Introduction to Azure IaC
abstract:
Howdy Coders, We're back for a whole new financial year. 

We'll have Ben Neoh and Rick Su joining forces to give their talk From Portal Panic to Pipeline Power: Introduction to Azure IaC.

For this talk we'll be at the SSW Newcastle office.
Parking: The best parking is at the Wright Lane Carpark.
Public Transport: The Civic light rail station is directly outside the venue.

We'd like to thank our sponsors

- SSW Newcastle
- Saphi Engineering

Production applications need infrastructure that is secure, repeatable, and maintainable. In this beginner-friendly session, Rick and Ben N. will introduce Azure Infrastructure as Code and explain how it helps teams build enterprise-grade cloud infrastructure with better consistency, maintainability, and scalability. You’ll learn why IaC matters and how it helps teams move from ad-hoc setup to reliable, code-based deployments.
